internships.title: React Frontend Developer Intern
internships.description: Join our dynamic frontend team to build high-performance web applications. You will work closely with designers to implement pixel-perfect UIs using React.js and Tailwind CSS. Experience with state management (Redux/Context API) is a plus.
requirements: Strong proficiency in JavaScript (ES6+) and React.js
Experience with responsive web design using CSS/Tailwind
Understanding of RESTful APIs integration
Knowledge of version control (Git)

internships.title: Backend Engineering Intern (Python/Django)
internships.description: We are looking for a backend enthusiast to help us scale our microservices architecture. You will write robust APIs using Django/FastAPI and optimize database queries for performance.
requirements: Solid understanding of Python and Django or FastAPI
Experience with relational databases (PostgreSQL/MySQL)
Knowledge of Docker and containerization
Familiarity with cloud concepts (AWS/Azure) is a bonus

internships.title: Data Science Intern
internships.description: Work on real-world datasets to extract actionable insights. You will clean data, perform exploratory data analysis (EDA), and build predictive models using Scikit-Learn and TensorFlow.
requirements: Proficiency in Python and data libraries (Pandas, NumPy)
Understanding of Machine Learning algorithms (Regression, Classification)
Experience with data visualization tools (Matplotlib, Seaborn)
Strong mathematical foundation (Statistics, Linear Algebra)

internships.title: Machine Learning Engineer Intern
internships.description: Assist in developing and deploying deep learning models for Computer Vision and NLP tasks. Experience with PyTorch or TensorFlow is essential.
requirements: Experience with Deep Learning frameworks (PyTorch/TensorFlow)
Knowledge of Neural Networks (CNNs, RNNs, Transformers)
Familiarity with model deployment (Flask/Streamlit)
Research mindset and ability to read academic papers

internships.title: Java Developer Intern
internships.description: Contribute to enterprise-grade applications using Java and Spring Boot. You will learn about microservices, dependency injection, and secure coding practices.
requirements: Strong core Java knowledge (OOP, Collections, Multithreading)
Familiarity with Spring Boot framework
Understanding of SQL and Hibernate/JPA
Good problem-solving skills

internships.title: Data Analyst Intern
internships.description: Analyze improved business performance through data-driven decisions. You will create dashboards in Power BI/Tableau and write complex SQL queries.
requirements: Proficiency in SQL and Excel
Experience with visualization tools (Power BI, Tableau)
Strong analytical and communication skills
Basic knowledge of Python for scripting is a plus

internships.title: Full Stack Developer (MERN) Intern
internships.description: Work across the entire stack from MongoDB database to React frontend. Ideal for candidates who want to build complete web applications from scratch.
requirements: Experience with MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js
Understanding of authentication (JWT, OAuth)
Ability to design RESTful APIs
Passion for building products

internships.title: Cloud & DevOps Intern
internships.description: Get hands-on experience with modern cloud infrastructure. You will work with AWS services, write Dockerfiles, and set up CI/CD pipelines.
requirements: Basic knowledge of Linux and Shell Scripting
Familiarity with AWS services (EC2, S3)
Understanding of Docker and Containerization
Interest in automation and infrastructure as code

internships.title: Android App Developer Intern
internships.description: Develop native Android applications using Kotlin. You will work on intuitive mobile UIs and integrate with backend services.
requirements: Proficiency in Kotlin and Java
Experience with Android Studio and Gradle
Knowledge of Android Architecture Componenets (ViewModel, LiveData)
Understanding of mobile UI principles

internships.title: PHP Web Developer Intern
internships.description: Maintain and enhance legacy web applications using PHP and Laravel. Great opportunity to learn backend logic and database management.
requirements: Knowledge of PHP and MySQL
Familiarity with Laravel or CodeIgniter frameworks
Understanding of HTML/CSS/JS basics
Ability to debug and fix issues

internships.title: Cyber Security Intern
internships.description: Assist our security team in monitoring network traffic and identifying vulnerabilities. You will learn about penetration testing and ethical hacking tools.
requirements: Basic understanding of Networking (TCP/IP, OSI Model)
Familiarity with Linux and command line
Knowledge of security tools (Nmap, Wireshark, Metasploit) is a plus
Passion for information security

internships.title: UI/UX Designer Intern
internships.description: Create intuitive and beautiful user interfaces for web and mobile apps. You will create wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity mockups using Figma.
requirements: Proficiency in Figma or Adobe XD
Strong portfolio demonstrating design skills
Understanding of user-centered design principles
Basic knowledge of HTML/CSS is helpful

internships.title: Human Resources Intern
internships.description: Support the HR team in recruitment, employee onboarding, and engagement activities. Great starting point for a career in HR management.
requirements: Pursuing MBA or degree in Human Resources
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
Proficiency in MS Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)
Organized and detail-oriented

internships.title: Digital Marketing Intern
internships.description: Assist in planning and executing digital marketing campaigns. You will work on social media management, content creation, and basic SEO tasks.
requirements: Knowledge of Social Media platforms (LinkedIn, Twitter, Instagram)
Basic understanding of SEO and Content Marketing
Creative thinking and good writing skills
Familiarity with tools like Canva or Google Analytics

internships.title: Business Analyst Intern
internships.description: Analyze business processes and bridge the gap between IT and stakeholders. You will document requirements and help in process improvement.
requirements: Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Proficiency in SQL and Excel
Good documentation and communication skills
Understanding of software development lifecycle (SDLC)
